basic_details.short_information: Fertilisers and Chemicals Travancore (FACT) has officially announced the Technician (Process) Recruitment 2026. The detailed notification was published on 11.05.2026 at FACT Official Website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 26 years (with 3 years relaxation for OBC-NCL and 5 years for SC/ST) and hold a B.Sc. Degree in Chemistry/Industrial Chemistry OR Diploma in Engineering (Chemical Engineering / Chemical Technology / Petrochemical Technology) can attend the walk-in selection on 21-05-2026. Direct links to download the notification and register for the walk-in are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 26 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST up to 5 years, OBC (NCL) up to 3 years.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. Degree in Chemistry/Industrial Chemistry OR Diploma in Engineering [Chemical Engineering/Chemical Technology (including Petrochemical Technology)]
qualification.details: Technician (Process): B.Sc. Degree in Chemistry/Industrial Chemistry OR Diploma in Engineering [Chemical Engineering/Chemical Technology (including Petrochemical Technology)]. Preference will be given to those who have completed Apprenticeship Training in the relevant discipline (Diploma/B.Sc) in FACT and submitted COP (Certificate of Proficiency)/AOCP issued by Directorate General of Training/NCVT.

salary_details.details: Consolidated pay of Rs.25,000/- per month Increase of 3% on successful completion of each year Leave, ESI, Provident Fund, TA & DA applicable based on eligibility, as per Rules of the Company

selection_process: Registration through Online Form Document Verification Walk-in Selection

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for FACT Technician (Process) posts?
faq.answer: The last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Technician (Process) posts at FACT is 21st May 2026. Candidates are advised to report on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Technician (Process) role?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is a B.Sc. Degree in Chemistry/Industrial Chemistry OR a Diploma in Engineering [Chemical Engineering/Chemical Technology (including Petrochemical Technology)].

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Technician (Process) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Technician (Process) position is 26 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST and OBC (NCL) categories as per government directives.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Technician (Process) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated pay of Rs. 25,000/- per month, with a 3% increase upon successful completion of each year.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the FACT Technician (Process) recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process involves registering by filling an online form on the official website and then attending a Walk-in Selection on the specified date with all original and self-attested copies of certificates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Technician (Process) role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes registration through an online form, document verification, and a walk-in selection.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview for FACT Technician (Process) recruitment scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the HR Department, FEDO Building, Eloor, Kerala, 683501.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any preference given to candidates with apprenticeship training?
faq.answer: Yes, preference will be given to candidates who have completed Apprenticeship Training in the relevant discipline (Diploma/B.Sc) in FACT and submitted COP (Certificate of Proficiency)/AOCP.

faq.question: Q9. What documents do I need to carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You need to carry original certificates and self-attested copies of certificates, including ID proof, educational certificates, and any other relevant documents as mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: This is a contract job for a fixed tenure engagement on an ad-hoc basis.
